breakdown: This PR fixes the streaming passthrough to normalize rewards_box payloads by adding a dedicated normalize_rewards_box_for_ui function that converts non-standard keys ('xp'/'xp_gained', 'gold_pieces'/'gold') to canonical forms. The naming is excellent with descriptive function and variable names. Type safety could be improved with explicit type hints on the new function. Test coverage is comprehensive with a real E2E test that forces the LLM to produce messy keys and verifies normalization.
key_changes: Add normalize_rewards_box_for_ui function that handles fallback keys (xp->xp_gained, gold_pieces->gold)
Add E2E test test_streaming_passthrough_normalization.py that verifies normalization with real LLM
Refactor streaming path to pass raw_structured_rewards_box and raw_structured_planning_block to helper functions
Add WHY comment explaining LLM-generated payloads use non-standard representations
